name: Broccoli Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large baking dish, combine the cooked and thawed frozen broccoli, sautéed onions, uncooked minute rice, cheese whiz, and cream of mushroom soup.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
